**
Chunk 1**

Lines added: 48, lines removed: 0

```diff
@@ -1,0 +1,48 @@
+# Keil MDK-ARM build outputs
+MDK-ARM/FIVE/
+*.axf
+*.bin
+*.hex
+*.elf
+*.map
+*.lst
+*.lnp
+*.bak
+*.ddk
+*.edk
+*.lst
+*.plg
+*.tra
+*.dep
+*.crf
+*.d
+*.o
+
+# Keil user-specific files
+*.uvguix.*
+*.uvoptx
+*_uvoptx.bak
+*_uvprojx.bak
+
+# Debug configuration
+MDK-ARM/DebugConfig/
+
+# J-Link files
+JLinkLog.txt
+JLinkSettings.ini
+
+# Event Recorder
+*.scvd
+
+# STM32CubeMX generated (optional, keep .ioc)
+.mxproject
+
+# ShiftEngine (IDE specific)
+.shiftengine/
+
+# Review and documentation (optional - remove if you want to track)
+*_Review.md
+*_Analysis.md
+Architecture_Design.md
+BSP_Design.md
+
```

</details>
</tool-use>
